case_title: PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC VS. LI YANG

docket_entries.description: REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $435.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 100117618) AS TO DEFENDANT YANG, LI
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT YANG, LI SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-15-2020
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100117618) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 200004689), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC SERVED DEC-27-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT YANG, LI
DECLARATION REGARDING INTEREST COSTS AND ATTORNEY FEES (TRANSACTION ID # 100117618) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT YANG, LI $22,467.19 PRINCIPAL, $435.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $22,902.19, SEE SCANNED DOC
